notes:
Faster start & stop — and a way to pin down the rest.

You told me the audio itself takes 5-10s to start AND stop every time, and that Lite mode didn't change it. That ruled out the UI, so I went into the narration engine and found a real one:

- On every stop/pause the app was ALSO spinning up the voice engine you are NOT using — creating it from scratch just to stop it, right before stopping the real one. Now it only touches the engine actually playing, and cuts it instantly. Stop should feel snappier right away.

To fix the "slow to start" half exactly, there is a new timing badge:
  1. Settings > Voice > turn on "Narration timing"
  2. Play a book, then pause it
  3. A small badge shows e.g. "start 4200 ms - neural" and "stop 120 ms"

Tell me those two numbers (and whether it says neural or device) and I will fix the start delay at the source.
